# InfinityMart Sales Management 360

> All-in-one POS, inventory, HRM, accounting, and reporting platform for retail and wholesale businesses.

InfinityMart Sales Management 360 is a web-based sales and inventory management system. It combines a point-of-sale terminal, multi-warehouse inventory control, HR and payroll, accounting, customer loyalty, and analytics into a single application.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-in entry point.
